pr.title: Record: L-BFGS Causal SLOT — val_bpb 1.0046 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Causal L-BFGS logit-space SLOT after pre-quant AdamW TTT and coprime loader keeps delta optimization restricted to already-scored context tokens.
techniques: Causal L-BFGS logit delta optimized using only previously scored context positions
Pre-quant AdamW TTT on EMA weights before GPTQ int6 with tuned damp/QK_GAIN
Weighted coprime-stride shard sampling complementing GPTQ/config tweaks
